title: Their gifts, tendencies, creative tools
content:
Their gifts, tendencies, creative tools
Your shared projects or missed projects
Symbolic functions (mirror, spark, stabilizer, etc)

3. |[Applications:]

Practical workflows, translated into their style

4. |[Rituals, Ghosts, Echoes:]

Missed moments
Unspoken truths
Things you never said—but now will

5. |[Offer:]

An open node
Their name in the book
A way to contribute if they want (feedback, writing, response)
